title: Lupin III: Dead or Alive
original_title: ルパン三世 DEAD OR ALIVE
overview: When Lupin heads to the kingdom of Zufu to pilfer its treasure, he incurs the wrath of its psychotic ruler General Headhunter, who places a dead-or-alive bounty on his head.
